prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3076R Gen II turbocharger** (ball-bearing, 62mm compressor wheel) for the **CZDA 2.5L TFSI (EA855 Evo)** engine, paired with a **Forge Motorsport Motorsport 4-bar MAP sensor** and **034 Motorsport billet aluminum intake manifold** to support 450+ HP on **Motul 300V 5W-40** full-synthetic oil

Install **AP Racing CP9660-2600 6-piston front brake calipers** with **380mm DBA 5000 Series XD rotors** (slotted, 2-piece) and **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads**, alongside a **H&R RS14 coilover suspension kit** (30mm drop, adjustable damping) with **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm)** for chassis rigidity

ECU remap via **Alientech KESS3** with a **custom Stage 2+ tune** (optimized for **E85 flex-fuel** via **Continental ethanol sensor**), targeting **22 PSI peak boost** with **MagnaFlow 304 stainless steel cat-back exhaust (2.5" piping, resonated x-pipe)** and **CTS Turbo high-flow downpipe (3.5" diameter, 200-cell catalytic converter)**
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit** (carbon fiber fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with **custom matte vinyl wrap (Avery Dennison Gloss Black with 3M Satin Black accents)** and **OEM+ RS grille delete (replaced with carbon fiber mesh from 034 Motorsport)**

**OZ Racing Ultraleggera HLT wheels (19x9.5 +35 ET, 5x112 PCD)** in **Gunmetal finish**, wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (255/35 R19)** with **H&R Trak+10 wheel spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear)** for aggressive flush fitment

**Seibon Carbon fiber RS-style rear diffuser** with **integrated LED reverse lights (Lux H8 V4 bulbs)** and **custom LED taillight overlays (Vland smoked lenses with sequential turn signals)**, paired with **Morimoto XB LED headlights (5500K, adaptive projectors)** and **Litchfield carbon fiber engine cover**
